title: Master Project Template & Specification Guide
tagline: A high-fidelity blueprint for documenting production-grade AI engineering projects.
__GUIDE_MARKDOWN: The 'problem' and 'solution' fields support full Markdown. You can include Tables, Bold text, and Lists.
problem:
### The Challenge

| Constraint | Requirement |
| :--- | :--- |
| Latency | < 200ms |
| Accuracy | > 95% |

1. **Scalability**: System must handle 1M+ requests.
2. **Security**: Data must be AES-256 encrypted.
solution:
### The Architecture

- **Agentic Flow**: Implemented a ReAct pattern.
- **Data Privacy**: Local-first PII masking.

decisions.rationale: Allows hybrid search over relational and vector data.

__GUIDE_FLOW: The 'flowDiagram' uses React Flow structure. 'nodes' are boxes, 'edges' are lines connecting them.
__GUIDE_MERMAID: Alternatively, use a simple 'mermaidDiagram' string for quick charts.
mermaidDiagram:
graph LR
  A[User] --> B(LLM)
  B --> C{Decision}
  C -->|Query| D[Database]
  C -->|Response| E[Interface]

codeSnippets.title: Agent Orchestration Logic

testimonial.text: This system transformed our regulatory workflow entirely.
testimonial.author: Executive Stakeholder
